category_sources: Official docs describe httptap as a CLI that dissects HTTP requests into DNS, TCP, TLS, wait, and transfer phases.
source_facts.description says httptap is an HTTP request visualizer with phase-by-phase timing breakdown.
display_name_sources: Official homepage, docs, and GitHub repository use httptap.
docs_sources: Official homepage https://httptap.dev links to the dedicated official docs domain https://docs.httptap.dev/.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository README describes httptap and includes source install instructions cloning https://github.com/ozeranskii/httptap.git.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official homepage GitHub link.
tags_sources: Official docs list DNS, TCP connect, TLS handshake, server wait, body transfer, TLS insights, and JSON export.
source_facts.description mentions HTTP request visualization and phase-by-phase timing.
